esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck IS NOT NULL
| STATS stuck_threads = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck))
    BY attributes.server, attributes.application, attributes.workmanager
// Non-zero stuck threads almost always indicate a serious problem:
// deadlocks, hung database connections, or unresponsive external services
| WHERE stuck_threads > 0
| SORT stuck_threads DESC
